name: Green Bean and Fennel Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
2 large fennel bulbs, trimmed, quartered lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise
4 ounces button mushrooms, trimmed and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together the balsamic vinegar, fresh lemon juice, olive oil, and water until blended.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling water until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain them.
4. Transfer the green beans to a large bowl filled with ice water. Drain the beans and pat dry.
(The salad can be made up to 1 day ahead. Cover the dressing and chill the green beans. Wrap the paper towels in which you dried the beans and chill.)
5. Add the fennel, mushrooms, parsley, chives, and lemon peel to the bowl with the beans.
6. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss gently.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Cover and chill for 30 minutes before tossing again and serving.
